agency_name: Michigan Department of Environment, Great Lakes, and Energy / Michigan PFAS Action Response Team
repeat_testing_guidance: No single statewide PFAS retesting cadence is fixed in Sharp v1. Use EGLE or local health investigation context and official Michigan advice for follow-up timing.
benchmark_notes: Michigan uses state drinking water standards and official investigation context. Private well interpretation remains reference-based and should not be framed as legal compliance.
